title: hieracium turritifolium subsp. scrofulosum
intro: Hieracium turritifolium subsp. scrofulosum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, known for its yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which have been shown to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium turritifolium subsp. scrofulosum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
